basics.name: Cuong Phung Thai (Eddie)
basics.quote: I turn manual business processes into automated systems using AI and practical tools.
activities: Building automation systems for business workflows
basics.unfair_advantage: A university student who has founded 2 startups, won academic research prizes competing against 2,500+ peers, closed a $5K marketing partnership deal solo at age 20, built a Virtual KOL persona with 1.3M+ reach sharing crypto experiences, and cut his own content workflow from 5 hours to 1 hour using AI automation — all simultaneously. Combines research-grade data thinking with the hands-on instinct to actually ship.

personal.university: University of Economics Ho Chi Minh City (UEH)

startups.name: nOps Labs
startups.description: AI video agency producing UGC videos, 2D animations, and news-format videos.

startups.name: Bep Ink
startups.description: FnB-specialist print brand in HCMC with AI lead-gen engine.

specializations.title: Operations Automation
specializations.summary: I build systems that reduce manual work and improve how business operations run.
what_i_do: Design automation systems using tools like n8n and APIs
Connect different tools into one streamlined process
example_projects: PM Agent: Automated task tracking and reporting
AI UGC System: Scaled content production to 100+ videos/day

specializations.title: Growth & Lead Generation
specializations.summary: I build systems that help businesses find and convert high-intent customers.
what_i_do: Collect and structure lead data from sources like Google Maps
Build scoring systems to identify high-quality leads
Design outreach and content systems for growth
example_projects: Bep Ink Lead Engine: Geo-targeted lead discovery in HCMC
Scraper System: Clustered F&B businesses into high-intent zones
X Automation: Built content system for consistent growth

specializations.title: Data & Decision Making
specializations.summary: I use data and structured thinking to support better business decisions.
what_i_do: Analyze data using econometrics and statistical models
Translate raw data into actionable insights
Apply structured thinking to market and business problems
example_projects: UEH Research: Econometric modeling for innovation analysis
Algo Trading Model: VN30 prediction using EMA & indicators

specializations.title: Content Automation Systems
specializations.summary: I build systems that automate content production and help businesses scale media output.
what_i_do: Design automated pipelines for video and content production
Integrate AI tools to generate scripts, visuals, and voice
Optimize workflows for speed and consistency
example_projects: AI UGC System (nOps Labs): 100–200 videos/day production pipeline
Content Bot: Automated research → scripting → publishing
AI Video Engine: Combined n8n + FFmpeg + AI tools into one workflow
business_impact: Scale content without hiring more people
